title: cineraria longipes
intro: Cineraria longipes, also known as Cineraria, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family, Asteraceae. Traditionally, the roots of Cineraria longipes have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as their ability to treat digestive issues. The health benefits associated with Cineraria longipes include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive problems, and treating skin conditions such as eczema. The herbal preparations of Cineraria longipes include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected areas.
